summary: REQ-19 appears implemented via a GenderThemeContext that sets a root `data-gender` attribute and persists to localStorage, plus global CSS variable palettes for girl/boy themes using Tailwind-compatible HSL tokens. REQ-20 is only partially implemented: HomePage references `/assets/sioj.png` with an animation, but the diff shows no added static asset file. REQ-21 appears addressed in HomePage’s hero by rendering a single hero ``, but the diff doesn’t fully prove removal on all affected pages.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the uploaded image `sioj.png` as a static frontend asset under `frontend/public/...` and use it as the Home page hero illustration.
missing_requirements.reason: HomePage references `/assets/sioj.png`, but the diff shows no added files and therefore no evidence that `frontend/public/assets/sioj.png` (or similar) was actually added.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/linked an "Alphabet & Numbers" feature/module on the Home page feature list.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest scope is limited to theme switching and hero image cleanup/animation; adding a new module link is outside REQ-19/20/21.
